title: analisa prd ini beri tanggapan km 1. jelaskan impact nya, su

messages.content: analisa prd ini beri tanggapan km 1. jelaskan impact nya, sudah ada impact analisis atau blm 2. jika implementasi apa saja yang harus di perhatikan dari sisi fe dan be 3. apa yg harus QA perhatikan setelah itu beri revisi ke PRD nya jika perlu

Saya akan mulai dengan membaca PRD yang dimaksud dan aturan QA analysis untuk memastikan analisa sesuai framework.Sekarang saya akan membaca referensi FE dan BE memory untuk analisa yang lebih dalam.Sekarang saya juga akan membaca global memory untuk canonical rules.Sekarang saya memiliki semua informasi yang diperlukan. Mari saya tulis analisa lengkapnya.

---

# Analisa Komprehensif: PRD WA Web Outbound Anti-Ban Guard

## 1. Impact Analysis — Apakah sudah ada?

**Belum ada.** PRD ini adalah **draft v0.1** — impact analysis belum ditulis. Yang ada baru:
- Tabel **Dependencies & Risks** (section 19) — tapi ini masih high-level risk, bukan impact analysis sistematis
- Tabel **Concurrency, Rate Limit & Idempotency** (section 17) — lebih ke test scenario, bukan impact
- **Migration & Rollout Plan** (section 14) — ada, tapi hanya outline prosedural

**Yang hilang:** Tidak ada mapping dampak ke modul-modul existing seperti yang diwajibkan oleh `impact-analysis-rule.md`.

### Saya buatkan Impact Analysis lengkapnya:

#### A. Directly Affected Modules (Explicit)

| Modul | Dampak | Level |
|-------|--------|-------|
| **WhatsApp Web Service** (BE: `whatsapp/`) | New anti-ban logic: pre-send validation, idempotency key generation, risk scoring, cooldown, safe mode, reconciliation | **HIGH** |
| **Broadcast Service** (BE: `broadcast-service/`) | Pre-send validation wrapper untuk broadcast dispatch, dedupe scope baru | **HIGH** |
| **Conversation Room** (FE: `ConversationChatRoom`) | Send button behavior berubah (disabled saat pending, warning/block feedback), paste detection | **MEDIUM** |
| **Broadcast UI** (FE: broadcast module) | Pre-dispatch validation flow berubah | **MEDIUM** |
| **Settings / WhatsApp Web** (FE: settings page) | Admin Anti-Ban Settings page baru, Audit Log Table baru | **MEDIUM** |

#### B. Indirectly Affected Modules

| Modul | Dampak | Level |
|-------|--------|-------|
| **Audit Service** (BE: `audit-service`) | Perlu schema baru untuk anti-ban audit logs, integrasi reason codes | **HIGH** |
| **API Gateway** (BE: `api-gateway`) | 3 endpoint baru (`POST /validate`, `GET /logs`, `PATCH /settings`) | **MEDIUM** |
| **Channel Service** (BE: `channel-service/`) | Safe mode state perlu di-sync dari WhatsApp Service | **LOW-MEDIUM** |
| **Conversation Service** (BE: `conversation-service/`) | Reconciliation flow terkait message status tracking | **LOW** |
| **Notification Service** (BE: `notification-service/`) | Potensi notifikasi ke admin saat safe mode / restriction | **LOW** |

#### C. Database Impact

| Entity | Perubahan | Level |
|--------|-----------|-------|
| **Anti-ban audit logs** | Collection baru: `anti_ban_audit_logs` — 12 bulan retention, reason codes, recipient fingerprint (masked) | **HIGH** (new collection) |
| **Risk score snapshots** | Collection baru: `anti_ban_risk_scores` — 90 hari retention | **MEDIUM** |
| **Cooldown / lock state** | Redis-based, TTL short-lived → **tidak perlu MongoDB** | **LOW** |
| **Reconciliation results** | Embedded di audit log atau collection terpisah | **LOW-MEDIUM** |
| **Sender Account** | Perlu field baru: `safeModeUntil`, `antiBanState` enum, `restrictionReason` | **MEDIUM** |

#### D. API Contract Impact

| Endpoint | Method | Dampak |
|----------|--------|--------|
| `POST /api/wa/outbound/validate` | **NEW** | Endpoint baru, tidak ada backward compatibility issue |
| `GET /api/wa/outbound/anti-ban/logs` | **NEW** | Endpoint baru |
| `PATCH /api/wa/outbound/anti-ban/settings` | **NEW** | Endpoint baru |
| Event: `wa.outbound.validation.result` | **NEW** | Internal event, baru |
| Event: `wa.sender.safe_mode.changed` | **NEW** | Internal event, baru |
| Event: `wa.outbound.reconciliation.updated` | **NEW** | Internal event, baru |

#### E. Concurrency Impact (CRITICAL)

| Skenario | Risk | Mitigasi |
|----------|------|----------|
| **Double-click send** | Duplicate delivery | UI disabled + server idempotency (✅ covered) |
| **Two browser tabs submit same message** | Duplicate parallel dispatch | Server-side idempotency key (✅ covered) |
| **Two broadcast workers resolve same recipient** | Race condition duplicate delivery | Recipient-level lock (✅ covered) |
| **Worker crash saat hold lock** | Stale lock block recipient selamanya | TTL recovery (✅ planned di FR-007) |
| **Timeout post-dispatch + retry** | Blind resend duplikat | ReconciliationPending + no blind resend (✅ covered) |
| **Burst operator sends** | Throttle/block | Cooldown + rolling risk score (✅ covered) |
| **Multi-tenant concurrency** | Resource contention antar tenant | Tenant-scoped isolation disebutkan, tapi **tidak ada detail resource limiting** ⚠️ |

#### F. Security / RBAC Impact

| Role | View | Create | Update | Notes |
|------|------|--------|--------|-------|
| Operator | Own warnings only | Send action | Denied | ✅ Sudah di PRD |
| Supervisor | Read-only logs | Denied | Denied | ✅ Sudah di PRD |
| Admin | Full | Allowed | Allowed | ✅ Sudah di PRD |
| Super Admin | Full | Allowed | Allowed | ✅ Sudah di PRD |
| IT Support | Full | Denied | Limited Override (TBD) | ⚠️ **TBD — perlu diklarifikasi** |

> ✅ **Catatan:** PRD sudah cukup detail untuk permission matrix. Tapi `IT Support` masih `TBD` untuk override behavior — ini perlu final.

#### G. Performance Impact

| Skenario | Target PRD | Realita |
|----------|-----------|---------|
| Pre-send validation | ≤100ms p95 | ➡️ **Perlu verifikasi** dengan: risk score calculation + lock acquisition + dedupe check + DB write audit log |
| Reconciliation flow | No SLA given | ➡️ Bisa jadi bottleneck jika banyak attempt dalam status `RECONCILIATION_PENDING` |
| Audit log writes | Per-event write | ➡️ **Risiko write amplification** pada burst scenario — perlu batch write atau async queue |

#### H. Integration Impact

| Dependency | Impact |
|------------|--------|
| **Existing outbound limit logic** | PRD bilang "reuse" tapi tidak detail integration point - ⚠️ Risk conflict |
| **Account eligibility logic** | Harus integrate dengan `channel-service` atau `whatsapp` service - perlu mekanisme call |
| **Sender Account rotation** | Safe mode harus trigger rotation — tapi rotation belum implemented di BE |
| **Existing Humanization** | PRD bilang "tidak redefine" — humanization timing bisa conflict dengan anti-ban cooldown |

---

## 2. Implementasi — Hal yang Harus Diperhatikan dari Sisi FE dan BE

### A. Frontend (FE)

Berdasarkan referensi `CLAUDE-fe.md`:

1. **Komponen baru yang perlu dibuat:**
   - **Admin Anti-Ban Settings** → Settings page baru di `apps/omnichannel/app/[locale]/(main)/settings/` — form dengan fields: `antiBanMode` (enum), `dedupeWindowSeconds`, `operatorCooldownSeconds`, threshold values
   - **Audit Log Table** → Read-only table + filter + detail row — mirip pattern `TicketTable` di ticketing
   - **Conversation Room Risk Warning** → Inline warning/toast component saat send di-delay atau di-block
   - **Account Detail / Sender Health** → State indicator untuk safe mode di settings WA Web
   - **Broadcast Send Validation** → Pre-dispatch validation step sebelum campaign mulai

2. **Perubahan komponen existing:**
   - **ConversationChatRoom** (`apps/omnichannel/components/pages/`):
     - Send button: `disabled` state saat loading/pending — menggunakan pattern **Zustand store** untuk `isSending` state
     - Toast/warning inline saat anti-ban blocked/delayed — integrasi dengan `react-query` mutation result
     - Paste event detection → perlu **custom hook** `usePasteDetection` di `hooks/conversation/`
   - **Broadcast flow**: wrapper pre-send validation dengan loading state + error handling

3. **State management:**
   - **Zustand store baru**: `anti-ban.store.ts` — `isSending`, `lastBlockReason`, `cooldownRemaining`, `currentRiskWarnings`
   - **React Query** untuk data fetching: `useAntiBanSettings.service.ts`, `useAntiBanLogs.service.ts`
   - **Mutation hooks**: `useValidateSend.service.ts` (POST validate), `useUpdateAntiBanSettings.service.ts` (PATCH settings)

4. **Socket/Realtime events:**
   - Subscribe ke `wa.sender.safe_mode.changed` → update sender health indicator secara real-time
   - Subscribe ke `wa.outbound.validation.result` → update UI feedback setelah send attempt

5. **i18n / Bahasa Indonesia:**
   - Semua string sudah disediakan di PRD section 9 — pastikan masuk ke `packages/i18n/`
   - Contoh: "Aktivitas pengiriman terlalu cepat. Coba beberapa saat lagi."

6. **Paste Detection di Browser:**
   - PRD minta detect paste event + compose-to-send duration
   - FE perlu implement `onPaste` event listener di compose area → kirim `pasteMetadata` ke BE saat send
   - ⚠️ **Privacy consideration**: apakah paste content dikirim? PRD bilang "paste event + compose-to-send duration" — pastikan **tidak mengirim full message content** ke anti-ban service, cukup metadata (boolean paste + durasi compose)

7. **Kompleksitas khusus:**
   - **Paste detection timing**: Bedakan single paste vs rapid sequential paste (beberapa paste dalam X detik)
   - **Cooldown countdown**: UI harus tunjukkan countdown "Coba lagi dalam X detik" setelah block
   - **Client-side submit protection**: FR-012 mandatory — WAJIB double-check juga server-side protection

### B. Backend (BE)

Berdasarkan referensi `CLAUDE-be.md`:

1. **Service Architecture Decision — Service Baru atau Existing?**

Ada 3 opsi arsitektur:

| Opsi | Approach | Pro | Kontra |
|------|----------|-----|--------|
| **A** | Internal logic di `whatsapp` service | No new inter-service call | Code bloat, isolated dari broadcast |
| **B** | `anti-ban-service` baru (microservice baru) | Clean separation, dedicated DB, audit terpusat | New service bootstrap overhead (proto, env vars, deployment) |
| **C** | Library/module bersama di `libs/` | Reusable, bisa dipanggil dari `whatsapp` dan `broadcast` | Butuh design anti-ban engine yang decoupled dari transport |

**Rekomendasi Saya: Opsi C** — Buat `libs/anti-ban/` sebagai shared business logic engine, lalu dipanggil dari `whatsapp/` dan `broadcast-service/`. Ini paling cocok karena:
- Anti-ban logic digunakan oleh dua service (whatsapp + broadcast)
- gRPC call untuk validasi akan blocking — lebih baik call local library
- Logging/audit bisa jadi service sendiri atau pakai `notification-service`

2. **Proto Contract Baru Dibutuhkan:**
   - Jika opsi microservice → proto baru: `anti-ban.proto`, register di `PROTO` + `GRPC_ENV`
   - Endpoints: `ValidateSend`, `QueryAuditLogs`, `UpdateSettings`

3. **Database Schema Baru:**
   ```ts
   // Collection: anti_ban_audit_logs
   @Schema({ collection: 'anti_ban_audit_logs', timestamps: true })
   export class AntiBanAuditLog extends BaseAuditSchema {
     @Prop({ required: true }) companyId: string;
     @Prop({ required: true }) organizationId: string;
     @Prop({ required: true }) actorId: string;            // operator/admin/system
     @Prop({ required: true }) senderAccountId: string;
     @Prop({ required: true }) recipientFingerprint: string; // masked
     @Prop({ required: true }) contentFingerprint: string;   // sha256
     @Prop({ required: true }) outboundSource: OutboundSourceEnum; // broadcast | conversation_manual
     @Prop({ required: true }) actionTaken: AntiBanActionEnum;     // allow | delay | queue | block
     @Prop({ required: true }) reasonCode: AntiBanReasonCodeEnum;
     @Prop() cooldownSeconds?: number;
     @Prop() winnerAttemptId?: string; // untuk duplicate suppression reference
   }
   
   // Index
   AntiBanAuditLogSchema.index(
     { companyId: 1, organizationId: 1, createdAt: -1 }
   );
   AntiBanAuditLogSchema.index(
     { companyId: 1, senderAccountId: 1, createdAt: -1 }
   );
   AntiBanAuditLogSchema.index(
     { companyId: 1, reasonCode: 1, createdAt: -1 }
   );
   ```

4. **Idempotency Key Algorithm:**
   ```
   idempotencyKey = sha256(
     tenantId + "|" +
     senderAccountId + "|" +
     recipientNormalizedPhone + "|" +
     contentFingerprint + "|" +
     outboundSource + "|" +
     logicalScopeRef
   )
   ```
   ⚠️ **Yang perlu diperhatikan:** PRD bilang "at minimum" — perlu definisi exact component key. Juga `logicalScopeRef` untuk broadcast: campaignId + batchId? Atau campaignId + segmentId?

5. **State Machine Implementation:**
   PRD section 11 sudah memberikan state transition model yang sangat detail. Wajib implement exact state machine di service layer. **Jangan inline logic — buat State Machine class**:
   ```
   AntiBanStateMachine
   ├── transitions: Map<CurrentState, Map<Trigger, NextState>>
   ├── guards: Map<Transition, GuardCondition[]>
   └── sideEffects: Map<Transition, SideEffect[]>
   ```

6. **Risk Score Algorithm:**
   - Rolling window per operator + per sender account
   - Signal inputs: paste event count, send cadence (ms antar send), identical content ratio, burst frequency
   - Threshold mapping ke action: allow → delay → queue → soft-block → hard-block
   - ⚠️ **PRD tidak memberikan formula scoring — hanya signal input.** Perlu engineering decision untuk bobot masing-masing signal

7. **Integration dengan Existing Systems:**
   - **Outbound Limit Logic**: gRPC call ke `whatsapp` service atau `channel-service` untuk cek `sent_today > recommended_cap`
   - **Account Eligibility**: gRPC call ke `channel-service` untuk cek status account
   - **Safe Mode**: setelah threshold, emit `wa.sender.safe_mode.changed` via RabbitMQ → konsumen: `whatsapp` service (stop send), `notification-service` (alert admin)
   - **⚠️ Risk:** PRD bilang "reuse" existing logic — tapi **existing anti-ban system belum terimplementasi di BE**. Realitanya, semua ini adalah **built from scratch**, bukan integrasi.

8. **Concurrency yang Wajib Diperhatikan:**
   - **Recipient Lock**: Gunakan **Redis distributed lock** (Redlock atau SET NX EX pattern) — bukan MongoDB findOneAndUpdate
   - **Lock TTL**: Sesuai FR-007 → pastikan TTL cukup untuk normal dispatch tapi tidak over-panjang (rekomendasi: dispatch timeout + 5s buffer)
   - **Atomic dedupe check + lock acquisition**: Wajib dalam satu operasi atomik untuk mencegah race condition antara dua request di detik yang sama

---

## 3. QA — Hal yang Harus Diperhatikan

### A. Test Strategy Overview

| Layer | Scope | Prioritas |
|-------|-------|-----------|
| **Unit Test** | State machine transitions, risk score calculation, validation logic | P0 |
| **Integration Test** | gRPC contract, lock mechanism, dedupe check + lock atomicity | P0 |
| **E2E Test** | Full flow: manual send → dedupe → broadcast send → audit log | P0 |
| **Concurrency Test** | Double-click, two tabs, two workers, stale lock recovery | P0 (CRITICAL) |
| **Performance Test** | Pre-send validation latency < 100ms p95, throughput burst | P1 |
| **Security Test** | RBAC enforcement, tenant isolation, score formula exposure | P0 |
| **Regression Test** | Existing WhatsApp send flow, broadcast flow, account management | P1 |

### B. Risk Matrix

| Risk ID | Risk Scenario | Probability | Impact | Severity | Mitigation |
|---------|--------------|-------------|--------|----------|------------|
| R-001 | **False positive block**: operator normal terblokir karena risk score terlalu sensitif | MEDIUM | HIGH | P0 | Monitor-only mode dulu, threshold configurable, false positive rate monitoring |
| R-002 | **Lock permanen**: Worker crash tanpa release lock → recipient tidak bisa dikirimi selamanya | LOW | CRITICAL | P0 | TTL lock wajib, recovery-safe re-evaluation |
| R-003 | **Race condition dedupe**: Dua request identik masuk dalam <1ms, keduanya lolos dedupe check | LOW | CRITICAL | P0 | Atomic check + lock dalam satu operasi Redis |
| R-004 | **Performance regression**: Pre-send validation >100ms mempengaruhi UX | MEDIUM | HIGH | P1 | Benchmark, async audit log write, caching |
| R-005 | **Audit log write failure**: Log gagal ditulis setelah send success | MEDIUM | HIGH | P1 | Graceful degradation + observability alert |
| R-006 | **Multi-tenancy resource starvation**: Satu tenant dengan burst tinggi mengganggu tenant lain | MEDIUM | MEDIUM | P2 | Per-tenant rate limiter untuk anti-ban service sendiri |
| R-007 | **Safe mode loop**: Account masuk safe mode → operator ganti akun → akun baru juga kena safe mode | MEDIUM | HIGH | P1 | Operator-level risk score harus turun sebelum allow switch |
| R-008 | **Reconciliation never resolves**: Status RECONCILIATION_PENDING terus karena worker mati | LOW | HIGH | P1 | TTL-based auto-resolve + support override |

### C. Edge Cases Kritis yang Wajib Di-test

| ID | Skenario | Kenapa Kritis |
|----|----------|---------------|
| EC-CRIT-1 | **Dua request broadcast worker untuk recipient yang sama dalam <1ms** | Race condition lock vs dedupe — wajib atomic |
| EC-CRIT-2 | **Operator send → timeout → operator retry manual → status RECONCILIATION_PENDING** | Blind resend mungkin terjadi jika reconciliation logic gagal |
| EC-CRIT-3 | **Audit log DB down saat send success** | Apakah send tetap dianggap berhasil? Atau rollback? |
| EC-CRIT-4 | **Operator paste + send 10x dalam 5 detik ke 10 recipient berbeda** | Burst detection harus triggered, cooldown diterapkan |
| EC-CRIT-5 | **Config invalid (dedupe window = 0 atau negative)** | Fallback to safe default — test validasi |
| EC-CRIT-6 | **Safe mode + account rotation bersamaan** | Integration test: safe mode trigger rotation → apa yang terjadi? |
| EC-CRIT-7 | **Operator di dua tab: Tab A send success, Tab B send identik dalam 100ms** | Server-side dedupe harus catch — test concurrency |
| EC-CRIT-8 | **Migrasi dari V1 (tanpa anti-ban) ke V2 (dengan anti-ban)** | Monitor-only mode harus zero false positive di production |
| EC-CRIT-9 | **Content sama tapi whitespace/case berbeda** | Normalized fingerprint harus handle ini |
| EC-CRIT-10 | **Broadcast + manual send ke recipient sama di waktu berdekatan** | Arbitration via recipient lock — test collision |

### D. Feature Flag & Rollout Strategy

PRD sudah menyebutkan **monitor-only → warning-only → soft-block → strict** staging. Yang perlu QA tambahkan:

1. **Feature Flag**: Pastikan ada toggle `anti_ban_enabled` per tenant
2. **Rollback Test**: 
   - Matikan flag → pastikan send flow kembali normal (tanpa pre-send validation)
   - Pastikan audit log tetap accessible meski flag off (read-only)
   - Pastikan tidak ada stale lock yang blocking send setelah flag off
3. **Canary Tenant**: Pilih tenant dengan volume rendah dulu, validasi 1-2 minggu
4. **Monitoring Threshold**: Alert jika false positive rate > 1%, blocked rate spike > 200% dari baseline, reconciliation pending > 10 dalam 5 menit

### E. Automation Candidate

| Scenario | Type | Tool | Priority |
|----------|------|------|----------|
| Send → duplicate → suppressed | E2E | Playwright | P0 |
| Send → blocked due to risk | E2E | Playwright | P0 |
| Two tabs submit same message | E2E | Playwright (multi-page) | P1 |
| Broadcast duplicate prevention | Integration | Vitest (BE) | P1 |
| Lock contention (2 workers) | Integration | Vitest (BE) | P1 |
| Stale lock recovery (worker crash) | Integration | Vitest (BE) | P1 |
| Audit log completeness | Integration | Vitest (BE) | P2 |
| Performance validation <100ms | Performance | K6/Artillery | P1 |
| RBAC enforcement (role x action) | Integration | Vitest (BE) | P1 |

---

## 4. Revisi PRD — Hal yang Perlu Ditambahkan/Diklarifikasi

Berdasarkan analisa di atas, berikut **revisi yang saya rekomendasikan** untuk PRD:

### Revisi 1: [NEW] — Idempotency Key Specification Detail

**Masalah:** FR-001 menyebut "at minimum: tenant, channel, sender, recipient, content fingerprint, outbound source, logical scope reference" — tapi tidak memberikan formula exact. Ini bisa menyebabkan interpretasi berbeda antara engineer.

**Usulan tambahan di FR-001:**
> Contoh implementasi idempotency key:
> ```
> idempotencyKey = sha256(
>   tenantId + "|" +
>   senderAccountId + "|" +
>   normalizedRecipientPhone + "|" +
>   contentFingerprint + "|" +
>   outboundSource + "|" +
>   logicalScopeRef
> )
> ```
> dimana:
> - `normalizedRecipientPhone` = format E.164 tanpa prefix (+)
> - `contentFingerprint` = SHA256 dari normalized content (lowercase, whitespace-trimmed, tanpa karakter non-printable)
> - `outboundSource` = `broadcast` atau `conversation_manual`
> - `logicalScopeRef` = `broadcast:<campaignId>:<batchId>` atau `conversation:<conversationId>`

### Revisi 2: [CLARIFY] — Reconciliation Flow Behavior Saat Timeout Ganda

**Masalah:** PRD bilang timeout → `RECONCILIATION_PENDING` → no blind resend. Tapi tidak menjelaskan: **berapa lama maksimal sebuah attempt stay di RECONCILIATION_PENDING?** Juga tidak ada mekanisme auto-resolve jika worker mati total.

**Usulan tambahan di FR-009:**
> - Reconciliation timeout: jika attempt berada di `RECONCILIATION_PENDING` selama lebih dari [TBD: 60 detik], system SHOULD auto-resolve ke `UNRESOLVED_TIMEOUT`.
> - Auto-resolve tidak otomatis melakukan resend — hanya mengubah status agar tidak blocking flow lainnya.
> - Support/admin dapat manual override status reconciliation melalui audit log UI.

### Revisi 3: [CLARIFY] — Risk Score Formula Detail

**Masalah:** PRD menyebutkan "rolling risk score" dan "signal inputs" tapi **tidak memberikan formula atau weighting**. Ini bisa menyebabkan implementasi yang berbeda antara engineer dan tidak konsisten.

**Usulan tambahan di FR-014/FR-015:**
> Risk score formula (conceptual — final formula perlu engineering decision):
> ```
> operatorRiskScore = (
>   pasteEventWeight × pasteCountInWindow +
>   burstWeight × (sendCountInWindow / windowDuration) +
>   identicalContentWeight × identicalContentRatio
> ) × recencyDecayFactor
> ```
> 
> Threshold default (configurable):
> - Warning: score > 50
> - Delay: score > 70
> - Block: score > 90
> 
> Recency decay: score half-life [TBD: 60 detik], agar operator yang berhenti melakukan risky behavior bisa kembali normal.

### Revisi 4: [NEW] — Stale Lock Recovery Detail

**Masalah:** FR-007 menyebut "TTL or recovery-safe expiration" tapi tidak detail — berapa TTL? Apa yang terjadi setelah TTL expire? Apakah langsung allow send baru atau perlu reconciliation?

**Usulan:**
> - Lock TTL default: 30 detik (harus lebih panjang dari max expected dispatch time + buffer)
> - Lock yang expired harus melalui **re-evaluation flow** bukan langsung allow send:
>   1. Cek apakah attempt original sudah selesai (cek status)
>   2. Jika tidak ada record → treat sebagai new attempt (re-validate)
>   3. Jika ada record dengan status RECONCILIATION_PENDING → treat sebagai reconciliation check
> - Never allow blind retry after lock expiry recovery

### Revisi 5: [CLARIFY] — Audit Log Write Failure Behavior

**Masalah:** PRD EH-010 menyebut "audit persistence degradation" tapi tidak jelas: **jika audit log write gagal, apakah send tetap diproses atau ditolak?** Ini impact besar ke reliability.

**Usulan klarifikasi:**
> - Audit log write failure = **non-blocking warning**, bukan blocking error. Send tetap diproses.
> - System MUST emit alert `anti-ban.audit.write.failure` untuk observability.
> - System SHOULD buffer audit events in-memory dengan bounded queue (max 1000 events) untuk retry.
> - Jika buffer penuh → drop oldest, alert tetap dikirim.
> - Jangan pernah menolak send karena audit write failure.

### Revisi 6: [NEW] — Multi-tenancy Resource Management

**Masalah:** PRD tidak menyebutkan proteksi antar tenant. Satu tenant dengan burst 1000 send/detik bisa memenuhi semua resource dan mengganggu tenant lain.

**Usulan:**
> - Anti-ban service SHOULD implement per-tenant rate limiter terpisah dari existing system rate limiter
> - Default: [TBD: 100] validation requests per second per tenant
> - Jika tenant melebihi limit → response `429 TOO_MANY_REQUESTS` → operator-side harus retry dengan exponential backoff
> - Anti-ban service sendiri harus scalable secara horizontal

### Revisi 7: [CLARIFY] — Safe Mode vs Account Rotation Integration

**Masalah:** PRD FR-021 menyebut "stop or downgrade behavior" saat safe mode. Tapi tidak menjelaskan **bagaimana hubungan dengan account rotation** (yang belum implemented). Apakah safe mode trigger rotation? Atau hanya block?

**Usulan:**
> - Safe mode: ONLY stop send from affected account
> - Rotation (jika sudah implemented di masa depan): Pilih akun dari reserved pool atau backup
> - Phase 1: Safe mode tidak memicu rotation otomatis — hanya block
> - Phase 2 (future): Safe mode + rotation integration

### Revisi 8: [NEW] — Performance Benchmark Baseline

**Masalah:** NFR menyebut ≤100ms p95, tapi tidak ada test scenario untuk validasi.

**Usulan tambahan di NFR:**
> Performance validation scenarios wajib:
> 1. Normal send (non-duplicate, low risk): ≤100ms p95
> 2. Duplicate suppression: ≤50ms p95 (harus lebih cepat karena langsung detected)
> 3. Burst scenario (50 concurrent send from same operator): ≤200ms p95 for all
> 4. Lock contention (5 workers compete for same recipient): winner ≤150ms p95, losers ≤30ms p95 (fast fail)
> 5. Audit log write under load (1000 logs/sec): async write ≤500ms p99

### Revisi 9: [CLARIFY] — Body / System Actor di Audit Log

**Masalah:** PRD US-008 menyebut "setiap event includes actor". Tapi banyak event adalah **system-triggered** (bukan user). Contoh: reconciliation, safe mode by threshold. Actor = apa?

**Usulan:**
> - Jika event triggered oleh operator/TLC → `actorId` = user ID
> - Jika event triggered oleh system (auto) → `actorId` = `"system"`, `actorType` = `"SYSTEM"`
> - Jika event triggered oleh admin override → `actorId` = admin user ID, `overrideReason` wajib diisi
> - Field `actorType` = enum: `USER` | `SYSTEM` | `ADMIN_OVERRIDE`
